creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Thu Nov  5 21:11:51 UTC 2015
New revision: 400870
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/400870

Log:
  oursql is a set of MySQL bindings for python 2.4+ with a focus
  on wrapping the MYSQL_STMT API to provide real parameterization
  and real server-side cursors. MySQL 4.1.2 or better is required.

  WWW: https://launchpad.net/oursql

  PR:		202915
  Submitted by:	Yuri Victorovich <yuri@rawbw.com>

Changes:
  head/databases/Makefile
  head/databases/py-oursql/
  head/databases/py-oursql/Makefile
  head/databases/py-oursql/distinfo
  head/databases/py-oursql/pkg-descr
